title: Local RAG Chat Workbench
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: Compact executable packet for a local-first RAG chat app with Ollama-compatible provider seams, durable SQLite/libSQL state, document ingestion, citations, memory/settings, and repeatable browser proof.
plainDescription: A fast Mapper AI-app regression packet inspired by Maxkrvo/OllamaChat. It is smaller than the swarm simulation workbench but still pressures provider adapters, RAG behavior, persistence, browser proof, lifecycle controls, and evidence honesty.
promise: Build a production-grade local RAG chat workbench without depending on the original source repo. Status remains PROOF_REQUIRED until proof gates pass.
whatYouGet: Executable Buildprint start and machine contract
Provider adapter, RAG, persistence, browser, lifecycle, and no-fake proof gates
Evidence ledger seed with runtime writes to .buildprint/evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl
whatYouNeed: Optional local Ollama runtime for live provider proof
Browser test tooling for repeatable UI proof
includes: 06-contracts/*.md role contracts for delegated architecture, UX/UI, integration/runtime, security, data persistence, and verification
risks: Counting deterministic provider responses as live Ollama proof
Static citations presented as RAG behavior
In-memory-only chat or documents counted as persistence
No-op memory, settings, export, delete, or reindex controls
Secret leakage through prompts, logs, screenshots, or evidence rows
checks: Provider adapter/config/tests required before live-proof blockers
Document ingestion and vector retrieval proof required
Repeatable browser/e2e proof required for UI phases
Qualification remains PROOF_REQUIRED until proof gates pass

trustBadges.label: Fast AI eval
trustBadges.detail: Compact local RAG packet for Mapper replay loops.

trustBadges.label: Local-first
trustBadges.detail: Ollama live proof is optional; provider seams are mandatory.

trustBadges.label: Proof required
trustBadges.detail: Live runtime, persistence, browser, and lifecycle proof remains pending.

copyPrompt: Use the Local RAG Chat Workbench Buildprint. First bootstrap exact snapshots: agb start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/local-rag-chat-workbench/package.json . If agb is not installed, clone https://github.com/DomEscobar/agent-buildprint and run node agent-buildprint/bin/agb.js start https://agent-buildprint.com/buildprints/local-rag-chat-workbench/package.json . Then read .buildprint/next-agent.md and continue. Do not write Buildprint snapshots manually. The bootstrapped guide will route through BUILDPRINT.md, 01-questions.md, 02-project-setup.md, blueprint.yaml, 03-phases/phase-index.yaml, 03-phases/phase-flow.md, the required 06-contracts/<role>.md files for the active phase, the active phase file, 04-evaluation.md, and 05-evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl. Complete project setup before phase implementation. Production-grade architecture is the default: implement Ollama-compatible provider adapters/config/tests, deterministic test doubles, durable SQLite/libSQL persistence, RAG/vector retrieval, browser/e2e proof, security controls, and lifecycle proof before accepting live-proof blockers. Missing local Ollama blocks live proof only after adapter/config/test/runtime wiring exists. Execute one active phase at a time through phase-flow with observe, plan, execute, verify, reflect, and record. Runtime evidence belongs in .buildprint/evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl; packaged 05-evidence/evidence-ledger.jsonl is seed-only. Keep claims proof-required until proof rows pass. Use subagents/delegated workers when supported; when unavailable, self-simulate each required role through the same handoff/return artifacts before phase_core_passed.

publicStatus.label: Mapped, proof pending
publicStatus.explanation: Compact AI-app packet exists; live implementation proof is not complete.
